name: Leslie Kean
summary: Investigative journalist whose reporting helped bring modern UAP programs, military encounters, and government records into mainstream public discussion.
profileSummary: Investigative journalist whose reporting helped bring modern UAP programs, military encounters, and government records into mainstream public discussion.
background: Journalist and author of UFOs: Generals, Pilots, and Government Officials Go on the Record.
inclusionNote: Included because her reporting—especially the 2017 New York Times investigation and later reporting on David Grusch—helped shape modern public and congressional awareness.

referenceSources.label: The New York Times: Glowing Auras and Black Money
Profile of Leslie Kean's UAP reporting
